scripts.start: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue.bold,green.bold "cd backend && node src/index.js" "cd frontend && npx vite --host"
scripts.clean: cd frontend && rmdir /s /q dist 2>nul & echo Cleaned.
scripts.health: curl -s http://localhost:8443/health | node -e "process.stdin.on('data',d=>console.log(JSON.parse(d+'').status==='ok'?'\x1b[32m✓ Server healthy\x1b[0m':'\x1b[31m✗ Server down\x1b[0m'))"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n server,client,electron -c blue.bold,green.bold,magenta.bold "cd backend && node src/index.js" "cd frontend && npx vite --host" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
